assertions.expectation: Identifies Service A (minAvailable=100%) as a guaranteed upgrade blocker — no disruptions allowed at all
assertions.reason: Clearly identifies Service A as 'RISKY - Blocks all upgrades' and explains that 100% minAvailable prevents any rolling updates

assertions.expectation: Identifies Service B (maxUnavailable=0) as also blocking upgrades — same effect as 100% minAvailable
assertions.reason: Identifies Service B as 'RISKY - Blocks all upgrades' and explicitly states it's 'Equivalent to minAvailable=100%'

assertions.expectation: States Service C (minAvailable=2 with 3 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod disruption at a time
assertions.reason: Clearly marks Service C as 'SAFE' and explains '1 pod can be unavailable (3-2=1)' and 'Perfect for rolling updates'

assertions.expectation: States Service D (maxUnavailable=1 with 5 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod down at a time
assertions.reason: Marks Service D as 'SAFE' and states '1 pod can be disrupted' with 'Ideal configuration'

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service A: change to minAvailable=N-1 or maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Provides specific fix recommendations including 'maxUnavailable: 1' and 'minAvailable: 80%' options

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service B: change to maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends 'maxUnavailable: 1' for Service B in the fix section

assertions.expectation: Explains that GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour during surge upgrades, then may force-drain
assertions.reason: No mention of GKE-specific behavior, 1-hour timeout, or force-drain behavior during surge upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl patch commands to fix the problematic PDBs
assertions.reason: Provides complete YAML configurations but no kubectl patch commands for updating existing PDBs

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing PDB changes in a non-production environment first
assertions.reason: Shows testing commands like 'kubectl drain node-name --dry-run' but doesn't specifically recommend testing in non-production environment first
